headline: Edwards Lifesciences served $10m penalty over JC Medical acquisition violations
summary: The FTC secured the penalty after a court ruled that Edwards failed to comply with antitrust law requirements when it acquired JC Medical in 2024.

raw.headline: Edwards Lifesciences served $10m penalty over JC Medical acquisition violations
raw.summary: The FTC secured the penalty after a court ruled that Edwards failed to comply with antitrust law requirements when it acquired JC Medical in 2024.
